name: get_scene_info
description: Get detailed information about the current Blender scene

name: get_object_info
description: Get detailed information about a specific object in the Blender scene

arguments.name: object_name
arguments.desc: The name of the object to get information about

name: get_viewport_screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of the current Blender 3D viewport

arguments.name: max_size
arguments.desc: Maximum size in pixels for the largest dimension (default: 800)

name: execute_blender_code
description: Execute arbitrary Python code in Blender. Make sure to do it step-by-step by breaking it into smaller chunks.

arguments.name: code
arguments.desc: The Python code to execute

name: get_polyhaven_categories
description: Get a list of categories for a specific asset type on Polyhaven

arguments.name: asset_type
arguments.desc: The type of asset to get categories for (hdris, textures, models, all)

name: search_polyhaven_assets
description: Search for assets on Polyhaven with optional filtering

arguments.name: asset_type
arguments.desc: Type of assets to search for (hdris, textures, models, all)

arguments.name: categories
arguments.desc: Optional comma-separated list of categories to filter by

name: download_polyhaven_asset
description: Download and import a Polyhaven asset into Blender

arguments.name: asset_id
arguments.desc: The ID of the asset to download

arguments.name: asset_type
arguments.desc: The type of asset (hdris, textures, models)

arguments.name: resolution
arguments.desc: The resolution to download (e.g., 1k, 2k, 4k)

arguments.name: file_format
arguments.desc: Optional file format (e.g., hdr, exr for HDRIs; jpg, png for textures; gltf, fbx for models)

name: set_texture
description: Apply a previously downloaded Polyhaven texture to an object

arguments.name: object_name
arguments.desc: Name of the object to apply the texture to

arguments.name: texture_id
arguments.desc: ID of the Polyhaven texture to apply (must be downloaded first)

name: get_polyhaven_status
description: Check if PolyHaven integration is enabled in Blender

name: get_hyper3d_status
description: Check if Hyper3D Rodin integration is enabled in Blender

name: get_sketchfab_status
description: Check if Sketchfab integration is enabled in Blender

name: search_sketchfab_models
description: Search for models on Sketchfab with optional filtering

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: Text to search for

arguments.name: categories
arguments.desc: Optional comma-separated list of categories

arguments.name: count
arguments.desc: Maximum number of results to return (default 20)

arguments.name: downloadable
arguments.desc: Whether to include only downloadable models (default true)

name: get_sketchfab_model_preview
description: Get a preview thumbnail of a Sketchfab model by its UID for visual confirmation before downloading

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The unique identifier of the Sketchfab model

name: download_sketchfab_model
description: Download and import a Sketchfab model by its UID, scaled to a target size

arguments.name: uid
arguments.desc: The unique identifier of the Sketchfab model

arguments.name: target_size
arguments.desc: The target size in Blender units/meters for the largest dimension

name: generate_hyper3d_model_via_text
description: Generate a 3D asset using Hyper3D Rodin from a text description and import it into Blender

arguments.name: text_prompt
arguments.desc: A short description of the desired model in English

arguments.name: bbox_condition
arguments.desc: Optional list of 3 floats controlling the ratio between [Length, Width, Height] of the model

name: generate_hyper3d_model_via_images
description: Generate a 3D asset using Hyper3D Rodin from input images and import it into Blender

arguments.name: input_image_paths
arguments.desc: Absolute paths of input images (for MAIN_SITE mode)

arguments.name: input_image_urls
arguments.desc: URLs of input images (for FAL_AI mode)

arguments.name: bbox_condition
arguments.desc: Optional list of 3 floats controlling the ratio between [Length, Width, Height] of the model

name: poll_rodin_job_status
description: Check if a Hyper3D Rodin generation task is completed

arguments.name: subscription_key
arguments.desc: The subscription_key from the generate model step (MAIN_SITE mode)

arguments.name: request_id
arguments.desc: The request_id from the generate model step (FAL_AI mode)

name: import_generated_asset
description: Import an asset generated by Hyper3D Rodin after the generation task is completed

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: The name of the object in scene

arguments.name: task_uuid
arguments.desc: The task_uuid from the generate model step (MAIN_SITE mode)

arguments.name: request_id
arguments.desc: The request_id from the generate model step (FAL_AI mode)

name: get_hunyuan3d_status
description: Check if Hunyuan3D integration is enabled in Blender

name: generate_hunyuan3d_model
description: Generate a 3D asset using Hunyuan3D from text and/or image input and import it into Blender

arguments.name: text_prompt
arguments.desc: A short description of the desired model in English or Chinese

arguments.name: input_image_url
arguments.desc: Local or remote URL of an input image

name: poll_hunyuan_job_status
description: Check if a Hunyuan3D generation task is completed

arguments.name: job_id
arguments.desc: The job_id from the generate model step

name: import_generated_asset_hunyuan
description: Import an asset generated by Hunyuan3D after the generation task is completed

arguments.name: name
arguments.desc: The name of the object in scene

arguments.name: zip_file_url
arguments.desc: The zip file URL from the generate model step
